//: Project-level MCP server configuration. Each KR's `source:` field refers to one of these providers. Replace the URLs / commands with the real servers you use; some providers ship official MCP servers, others have community ones, and you can always write a tiny custom one against your warehouse.

warehouse.//: Replace with your warehouse-of-choice MCP server (BigQuery, Snowflake, Postgres, etc). The example below assumes a small custom server that exposes named, parameterized queries.
